test.create_query: CREATE TABLE h3_indexes_perf (h3 UInt64) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO h3_indexes_perf SELECT geoToH3(55.75 + rand(1) / 0x100000000, 37.62 + rand(2) / 0x100000000, toUInt8(9)) FROM zeros(100000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM zeros(100000) WHERE NOT ignore(geoToH3(55.75 + rand(1) / 0x100000000, 37.62 + rand(2) / 0x100000000, toUInt8(9)))
SELECT count() FROM h3_indexes_perf WHERE NOT ignore(h3ToGeo(h3))
SELECT count() FROM h3_indexes_perf WHERE NOT ignore(h3ToGeoBoundary(h3))
SELECT count() FROM h3_indexes_perf WHERE NOT ignore(h3ToParent(h3, materialize(toUInt8(3))))
SELECT count() FROM h3_indexes_perf WHERE NOT ignore(h3CellAreaM2(h3))
SELECT count() FROM h3_indexes_perf WHERE NOT ignore(h3IsValid(h3))
SELECT count() FROM h3_indexes_perf WHERE NOT ignore(h3kRing(h3, materialize(toUInt16(1))))
SELECT count() FROM h3_indexes_perf WHERE NOT ignore(h3Distance(h3, materialize(geoToH3(55.75, 37.62, toUInt8(9)))))
